subprocess_flow.description: Establish the specific safety and ethical constraints for the agentic system based on the proposed architecture. This involves identifying potential misuse cases, bias risks, and operational limits that the system must adhere to during execution.
success_criteria: Documented list of prohibited actions and ethical constraints.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To set the foundational rules for what the agentic system can and cannot do.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Vague boundary definitions leading to bypassable safety measures.
step_risks_and_controls.control: Use of a standardized safety taxonomy and peer review of constraints.

governance_requirements: Alignment with internal Ethical AI guidelines.

change_management.change_request_process: Submit boundary revisions to the AI Strategy committee.
change_management.versioning_rules: Major version increment for any new prohibited action.

subprocess_flow.description: Develop technical filters and validation layers that inspect data entering and leaving the agentic system. This includes prompt injection detection for inputs and PII/toxicity filtering for outputs to ensure safe interactions.
success_criteria: Design includes specific filtering logic for prompt injection and data leakage.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To prevent malicious inputs and unsafe or non-compliant outputs.
subprocess_flow.scope: Technical design of filtering and validation components.
end_conditions: I/O guardrail specifications are integrated into the architecture.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Guardrails introduce excessive latency to the system.
step_risks_and_controls.control: Performance benchmarking of filtering layers during the design phase.

governance_requirements: Compliance with GDPR data minimization principles.

change_management.versioning_rules: Documented in the Technical Architecture version log.

subprocess_flow.description: Specify the telemetry and logging requirements for tracking the system's adherence to safety rules in real-time. This includes setting up alerts for boundary violations and performance drift that could impact safety.
success_criteria: Specification includes real-time alerting for safety violations.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide visibility into the system's safety performance during operation.
end_conditions: Monitoring plan is approved by the technical lead.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Alert fatigue from overly sensitive safety triggers.
step_risks_and_controls.control: Definition of severity levels and tiered alerting logic.

governance_requirements: Audit trail requirements for AI decision-making.

change_management.change_request_process: Standard IT change management for monitoring tools.
change_management.versioning_rules: Alerting thresholds tracked in configuration management.

subprocess_flow.description: Consolidate the boundary definitions, technical guardrail designs, and monitoring plans into a single comprehensive specification document. This document serves as the safety blueprint for the implementation team.
success_criteria: Complete document signed off by the AI Solution Architect.
subprocess_flow.purpose: To provide a unified deliverable for safety engineering.
end_conditions: Safety measures integrated into the technical design.

step_risks_and_controls.risk: Inconsistencies between the technical design and safety specification.
step_risks_and_controls.control: Final cross-reference check against the core Technical Architecture Document.

governance_requirements: Final sign-off required for the RFP submission package.

improvement_inputs: Template effectiveness feedback from delivery teams
